GymState.title: GymState
GymState.description: The real-time operational state of the NCU Gym, including occupancy, region levels, announcements, equipment status, student feedback, and historical logs.

regions.description: Lists of regions and usage rates

equipments.description: Register of equipment damage and service records

StaffMember.title: StaffMember
StaffMember.description: An authorized staff member or service desk worker with administrative/operations panel permissions.

email.description: The authorized Google account email address (lowercase)

assignedBy.description: Email of the admin who assigned them

/config/gymState.description: Global singleton document managing the NCU Gym operative stats.

/staff_members/{email}.description: Individual access records mapped by lowercase email addresses.
